base_url.description: Your Zendesk Chat account root, e.g. https://acme.zendesk.com/api/v2/chat for subdomain 'acme'. Also usable as a base URL override for tests/proxies.

access_token.description: Zendesk Chat OAuth access token. Sent as Authorization: Bearer <access_token>; never logged.

start_date.description: RFC3339 lower bound for the chats incremental-export stream; converted to a Unix-seconds start_time query value.
